mapper.select:
select * from survey
and title ilike '%' || #{title} || '%'
and is_delete = #{isDelete}
order by status desc, create_time desc
mapper.update: UPDATE survey SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE survey SET title = #{title} WHERE id = #{id}
update survey set is_delete = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select status from survey where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update survey set is_delete = 0 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM survey WHERE id = #{id} and is_delete = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey (title, status, create_time, creator, is_delete) VALUES(#{title}, 0, now(), #{creator}, 0)
